chain.thought: Explanation: After 2011 (i.e., in 2012 and 2013), the team used Chevrolet engines, indicating they adopted Chevrolet. They previously used Honda (2006–2011) but did not use it after 2011, indicating they refused to adopt Honda.

judge_thought:
Explanation:
After 2011, the table shows only the following entries:
- 2012: engine = chevrolet
- 2013: engine = chevrolet

This indicates the team adopted Chevrolet after 2011. Honda appears in earlier years (2006–2011) but does not appear after 2011, meaning the team did not adopt Honda in the post-2011 seasons referenced. Therefore, the engine adopted was Chevrolet, and the engine refused to adopt (i.e., not used after 2011) was Honda.
